Fetch Multiple Years of NJ K-12 State Aid

Source: R/state_aid.R
fetch_many_state_aid.Rd

Fetch Multiple Years of NJ K-12 State Aid

Usage

fetch_many_state_aid(end_year_vector)

Arguments

end_year_vector

vector of school years (end of the academic year). Valid values are 2019 and later.

Value

A single tibble, the per-year results of fetch_state_aid stacked (one row per district per category per year).

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
library(dplyr)

# Transportation aid trend for one district across years
fetch_many_state_aid(2022:2026) %>%
  filter(district_id == "3570", aid_category == "transportation_aid") %>%
  select(end_year, amount)
} # }
